name: Netskope
description: Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB) and Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) platform providing cloud security, data protection, and network security services.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verify that security alerts are being generated and monitored for threats and policy violations

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Verify that security policies are configured and enforced to protect against unauthorized access

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Verify that connected client devices are being tracked and managed

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verify that audit logs are being generated and retained for compliance and security monitoring
